name: LendNation
description_short: LendNation at 2320 E Layton Ave, St Francis, WI offers fast payday and title loans.
description_long:
LendNation's St Francis location is at 2320 E Layton Ave, a standalone storefront serving residents across St Francis, WI and the surrounding neighborhoods. Open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM, this branch is conveniently located to help St Francis residents access quick financial solutions when they need them.

This St Francis storefront specializes in payday loans and title loans—flexible short-term lending options designed for immediate cash needs. Contact the branch directly at +1 414-482-1800 to discuss your specific situation, apply, or ask about eligibility requirements and lending terms.

St Francis residents can visit during business hours with a valid ID, recent pay stubs, and proof of a checking account to apply. LendNation processes applications quickly to get funds when you need them most.
address: 2320 E Layton Ave, St Francis, WI 53235

company_info.headquarters: 2320 E Layton Ave, St Francis, WI 53235

pros: Instant debit card funding for same-day cash access
Multiple loan types available: payday, multi-pay installment (up to 36 months), and title loans
200+ physical locations across 11 states with long-established local branches
Online and in-store application options with stated instant decision on pre-approval
4.8/5 Google rating from 161 reviews at the San Antonio Bandera Road location
Title loan borrowers keep driving their vehicle during the loan term
Check cashing and Insight Mobile Banking cards available for unbanked consumers
cons: No APR, fee schedules, or rate ranges disclosed on the website — makes cost comparison impossible before applying
Title loans require free-and-clear vehicle title as collateral — default risk includes repossession
Product availability varies by state — not all loan types or online access offered everywhere
Payday loans are due on or around next payday, creating rollover risk for borrowers who cannot repay in full
Presence limited to 11 states — unavailable to most of the US
best_for: Consumers needing $100–$1,000 fast cash before their next payday with limited credit alternatives
Vehicle owners with a free-and-clear title who need a larger loan amount with structured repayments
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who also need check cashing or prepaid banking services
Borrowers in one of LendNation's 11 operating states who prefer face-to-face service at a physical branch
diagnosis: LendNation is best suited for consumers facing a genuine short-term cash shortage who lack access to bank credit or credit cards and need funds the same day. The main caveat is cost opacity — LendNation does not publish rates online, payday loans carry industry-typical high APRs, and title loans put a vehicle at risk if the borrower defaults; it should be used only as a last resort for true emergencies.
services: Payday loans (cash advances, $100–$1,000, due next payday)
Multi-pay installment loans (up to 36-month terms, bi-weekly/semi-monthly/monthly payments)
Title loans (vehicle-secured, longer terms, structured payments)
In-store and online loan applications with instant pre-approval decision
meta_description: LendNation at 2320 E Layton Ave, St Francis, WI. Fast payday and title loans with same-day service.
